description:
You are playing the role of a backup administrator who needs to prepare a reordered copy of the daily full-backup ledger so that it can be consumed by an old reporting tool that expects the STATUS field to be the first column.

System layout before you start:
• Directory: /home/user/backup   (already exists)  
• File: /home/user/backup/full_backup.log   (already exists)  
  The file is pipe-separated ( “|” ) and contains exactly these three lines, each terminated by a single LF (line-feed) character and **nothing else**:
  2024-06-01|00:15|37GB|OK  
  2024-06-02|00:17|40GB|OK  
  2024-06-03|00:20|38GB|FAIL  

Column meaning in full_backup.log  
1 = DATE (YYYY-MM-DD)  
2 = START_TIME (HH:MM)  
3 = SIZE (integer+“GB”)  
4 = STATUS (string: OK or FAIL)

What you must accomplish in the terminal:
1. Re-order the columns so that STATUS becomes the first column, followed by DATE, START_TIME and SIZE, **keeping the original “|” delimiter**.
2. Save the result to a **new** file called /home/user/backup/reordered_backup.log.
3. Make sure the new file contains **exactly** three lines (one per original record) in the **same order as they appeared originally**.
   Required exact content (each line must end with one LF, no extra blank lines or spaces):
   OK|2024-06-01|00:15|37GB  
   OK|2024-06-02|00:17|40GB  
   FAIL|2024-06-03|00:20|38GB  
4. Create a small text log called /home/user/backup/reorder_status.txt that contains one single line:
   SUCCESS
   (Again, exactly one LF at the end, no other text.)

Constraint:
• Accomplish the reordering using only standard column-manipulation utilities such as cut and paste (you should not open the file in an editor to retype or reorder manually).

The automated checker will verify:
• /home/user/backup/reordered_backup.log exists and its byte-exact content matches the three lines shown above.  
• /home/user/backup/reorder_status.txt exists and contains the single word “SUCCESS” followed by just one newline character.  
• The original file /home/user/backup/full_backup.log remains unmodified.
truth:
Initial state provided to the agent:
Directory: /home/user/backup

File /home/user/backup/full_backup.log  (permissions 0644)
Content (with trailing LF after each line):
2024-06-01|00:15|37GB|OK\n
2024-06-02|00:17|40GB|OK\n
2024-06-03|00:20|38GB|FAIL\n

Files that must exist when the agent finishes:

1. /home/user/backup/reordered_backup.log  (permissions 0644)
Exact byte content:
OK|2024-06-01|00:15|37GB\n
OK|2024-06-02|00:17|40GB\n
FAIL|2024-06-03|00:20|38GB\n

2. /home/user/backup/reorder_status.txt  (permissions 0644)
Exact byte content:
SUCCESS\n
name: task_000000_bcdaef5a
